sql_array: CREATE TABLE geolocation_data (id UInt32, hash_str String);
SELECT geohashDecode(hash_str) AS coordinates FROM geolocation_data WHERE id = 1;
UPDATE geolocation_data SET hash_str = 'gcpuv' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT geohashDecode(hash_str) AS new_coordinates FROM geolocation_data WHERE id = 1;
